top_signals.title: Oil Markets Ignore Mounting Risks at Their Own Peril
top_signals.summary: Escalating U.S.-Iran hostilities, attacks on critical infrastructure, and near-halted Hormuz tanker traffic are fueling expectations of higher oil prices. Friday, July 17, 2026 US forces striking civilian infrastructure in Iran, Tehran attacking a Kuwaiti power and desalination plant, repeated attacks on tankers in the Hormuz Strait and the potential extension of maritime warfare towards the Bab el-Mandeb Strait – all this points towards oil prices continuing their upward movement in the days to come. With Hormuz transits falling close to…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Warsh’ington times
top_signals.summary: The Fed chair offered little new information to Congress on his plans to shake up the central bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Netflix stock falls as earnings forecast disappoints, company says it will give fewer engagement updates
top_signals.summary: The streaming giant said it would cut back on the frequency of its "What We Watched" reports, which provide a picture of engagement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: US chip stocks head for worst week in more than a year
top_signals.summary: High-flying semiconductor shares fall as ‘momentum trades’ backfire
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Robert Jenrick’s wife knew in 2024 about foreign payments to his top donor, lawyer claimed
top_signals.summary: Police are investigating the legality of donations to the politician during his Conservative Party leadership bid
